name: agents-foundation
description: A reusable delivery foundation for Claude Code: an agent team + work/ kanban (delivery-team), and an opinionated stack layer.

plugins.name: delivery-team
plugins.description: Agnostic delivery process: role agents (planner/reviewer/docs/qa/delivery-manager), the work/ markdown kanban, deterministic board/docs/verdict gates, /init scaffolder, and the engineering principles.

plugins.name: stack-turbo-nest-react
plugins.description: Opinionated stack layer (v0, as-built): NestJS + React/Turborepo implementer agents and their architecture/backend/frontend/delivery rules. Depends on delivery-team.
